title: 大阪杯の後に・自然発生

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon shocks the crowd with her display
of potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her legs in good shape, she's gained full
confidence in her ability to run through the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon goes on to make advancements in
her body modification research while preparing
for her next race—the Takarazuka Kinen.
